creator: scf@FreeBSD.org
text:
I have seen this before.  It is related to the xrender capability of 
Firefox.  Try disabling xrender within Firefox, by changing 
gfx.xrender.enabled to false.  I am not sure if Firefox and/or the 
Nvidia driver is at fault for it.

Does this workaround help you?

Sean
-- 
scf@FreeBSD.org
